title: Roof-to-Wall Transition — TPO Membrane to Metal Panel Wall

evidence_refs.summary: Field observation showing proper counter-flashing lap and sealant termination

notes: Critical transition. TPO membrane base flashing extends min 8 inches above roof plane. Counter-flashing by sheet metal trade laps over base flashing min 4 inches. Sealant at top of counter-flashing. Air barrier must be continuous through transition.
